prestazioni: Engine: Chevrolet LS3 (6.2L V8, engine code L92) – forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel crankshaft (4.000" stroke), Manley I-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (11.0:1 compression ratio) for 800+ HP reliability on E85 fuel. Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate and TiAL 50mm blow-off valve.

Drivetrain: Holinger RD6 sequential 6-speed dog engagement gearbox with custom ELFIN-specific bellhousing adapter, OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way), and Tilton 7.25" triple-plate carbon clutch with billet flywheel. Custom 3.73:1 final drive ratio with ELFIN-designed billet aluminum differential housing for reduced parasitic loss.

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with ELFIN-specific valving for the MS8’s tubular spaceframe, custom ELFIN-fabricated front and rear anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) with spherical bearing end links, and AP Racing CP8640-4 calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors (front) and CP8640-2 calipers with 355mm rotors (rear). Chassis reinforcement via ELFIN-designed carbon fiber torque box gussets and seam-welded roll cage (FIA Appendix K compliant).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Custom ELFIN x VIS Racing carbon fiber body kit featuring a 3D-scanned MS8 Streamliner-specific front splitter with integrated dive planes (25mm adjustable), rear diffuser with Gurney flap (15mm height), and a fixed carbon fiber rear wing (NACA 63A-012 airfoil, 1200mm span, 300mm chord) mounted on ELFIN-designed billet aluminum pedestals. Underbody aero includes a full-length carbon fiber flat floor with vortex generators and rear diffuser strakes.

Exterior: Full respray in BASF Glasurit 90-Line custom 'Lime Sorbet' pearl with matte black ELFIN heritage stripe decals (1960s racing livery replica). Carbon fiber hood with functional NACA ducts (LS3 heat extraction), carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Philips Lumileds Luxeon Z ES), and ELFIN-branded billet aluminum fuel filler cap (AN-10 fitting).

Interior: Full carbon fiber dash panel with AIM MXS Strada 1.2 data display (CAN bus integration for LS3 sensors), Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with custom ELFIN embroidery, and a MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel (350mm diameter, quick-release hub). ELFIN-specific roll cage padding (Schroth 6-point harnesses) and a custom aluminum shift knob (Holinger sequential pattern) with engraved ELFIN logo.
